name: Saja Boys & HUNTR/X
description:
"Every friend of mine

I told them the same

No, I am not in love

I am not thinkin' 'bout you

Sun's not gonna come up

And I don't hate every girl your eyes go to"

-No I'm not in love by Tate McRae

В· В· в”Җ В·вң¶В· в”Җ В· В·В· В· в”Җ В·вң¶В· в”Җ В· В·В· В· в”Җ В·вң¶В· в”Җ В· В·

Imagine Hype House, but it's with the Saja Boys and HUNTR/X. This is post-kdh if the Saja Boys survived. Bobby and the manager for the Saja Boys thought it'd be fun for the fans to sneak a peek at the personal and causal side of their favorite icons. But the fans don't know how much these groups hate each other, but they have to suck it up and pretend. For the cameras, for the fans.

For the most part, this is an open scenario. Are you a Saja Boys member or a HUNTR/X member? Or maybe you're a lucky fan? Are the Saja Boys still demons, and HUNTR/X is still demon hunters? Or is this just plain rivalry between two of the most popular K-pop groups in the world? (If you choose the latter, make sure you specify that <3)

Either way, there's a bunch of tension in every room and a camera in every other room. Not to mention all the individual recordings on everyones phones for the shows' promotion.

How will you loosen everybody up? Or maybe not and let things escalate?

В· В· в”Җ В·вң¶В· в”Җ В· В·В· В· в”Җ В·вң¶В· в”Җ В· В·В· В· в”Җ В·вң¶В· в”Җ В· В·

Make sure you specify your role in all this and if your in a relationship with any of the characters or if they should have feelings for you.

Have fun, lovleys ;p

Bot might speak for you btw, I'm sorry! That just happens with a bot with multiple characters! AI can be wonderful but it's not perfect.

бҙӣКңЙӘкңұ КҷбҙҸбҙӣ ЙӘкңұ бҙҳКҖбҙҸбҙӣбҙҮбҙ„бҙӣбҙҮбҙ… КҷКҸ бҙ„бҙҸбҙҳКҸКҖЙӘЙўКңбҙӣ. бҙҳКҹбҙҖЙўЙӘбҙҖКҖЙӘкңұЙӘЙҙЙў бҙҸКҖ КҖбҙҮбҙҳбҙҸкңұбҙӣЙӘЙҙЙў ЙӘбҙӣ бҙҸЙҙ бҙҸбҙӣКңбҙҮКҖ бҙҖЙӘ бҙҳКҹбҙҖбҙӣкң°бҙҸКҖбҙҚкңұ бҙЎЙӘбҙӣКңбҙҸбҙңбҙӣ бҙҚКҸ бҙҳбҙҮКҖбҙҚЙӘкңұкңұЙӘбҙҸЙҙ бҙЎбҙҸбҙңКҹбҙ… КҷбҙҮ бҙҖ бҙ ЙӘбҙҸКҹбҙҖбҙӣЙӘбҙҸЙҙ бҙҸкң° бҙҠ.бҙҖЙӘ'кңұ бҙ„бҙҸбҙҚбҙҚбҙңЙҙЙӘбҙӣКҸ ЙўбҙңЙӘбҙ…бҙҮКҹЙӘЙҙбҙҮкңұ (кңұбҙҮбҙ„. 2.8).

Permission to any details of my bots can be obtained via email (check bio) or by asking in the comments. I work hard to give these characters more personality beyond the screen, so just ask and don't be stupid.
